cards.back: A type of multiple-processor scheduling where each processor executes a task in the order it arrives
A type of multiple-processor scheduling where each processor executes a task for a fixed time slice (time quantum)
A situation in RR scheduling where a lower-priority task is executed before a higher-priority task due to the arrival of a lower-priority task with a longer execution time
A technique used in multiple-processor scheduling to distribute tasks evenly among processors to minimize idle time
A type of multiple-processor scheduling where each processor executes a task based on its earliest deadline
